function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "commit", "action_id": "notify_guard", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": 0.5, "adjustment_reasons": ["E3 already confirmed — threat to property, not ambiguous noise", "Zero false-alarm history at this site for door forced events (novelty — no precedent of nuisance alarms)", "Hand-set prior (n=0) is weak — door forced at E3 warrants positive adjustment"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.72, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If the guard reports a false alarm (e.g., maintenance staff with a key, door misalignment), or if video review shows non-threatening activity. A silent re-close or scheduled access confirmation would also downgrade this."}
